nasb.text: And he said, “The Jews have agreed to ask you to bring Paul down tomorrow to the Council, as though they were going to inquire somewhat more thoroughly about him.

esv.text: And he said, “The Jews have agreed to ask you to bring Paul down to the council tomorrow, as though they were going to inquire somewhat more closely about him.

cnv.text: 他說：“猶太人已經約好了，要求你明天把保羅帶到公議會裡去，裝作要詳細審查他。

ccb.text: 他说：“那些犹太人约好了，要请求你明天带保罗到公会受审，假装要详细审问他的事。

csbs.text: 他说：“犹太人已经说好，要请求你明天把保罗带到议会去，假装要更详尽地查问他的事。
